# STRAT.063 ? Ikigai (Japanese Purpose)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** self_development
**Domain:** SELF_DEVELOPMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Intersection of: what you love, what you're good at, what world needs, what you can be paid for; reason for being; small joys

## Application
Find passion; develop skills; serve world; earn living; integrate all four; daily small joys; purposeful living; long-term view

## Key Values
- Purpose
- Integration
- Service
- Joy
- Long life

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, self_development

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
